headline: Is Autodesk, Inc. (ADSK) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is ADSK a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Autodesk, Inc. on r/ValueInvesting by Far-East-locker. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on ADSK. Autodesk, Inc.’s share was trading at $240.95 as of May 28th. ADSK’s trailing and forward P/E were 45.32 and 19.01 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Autodesk, […]
